revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)

Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_link_without_namespace%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_link_without_namespace%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Documentation subpage}}
{{High-use}}
{{tsh|c}}
<!----PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES WHERE INDICATED AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE---->
{{Distinguish|Template:Circa}}

== Usage ==
: {{tlx|c |''category name''}}
: {{tlx|c |''category name'' |''link text''}}

Use {{tl|c}} to create a [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespace]]-free link to a category, e.g. {{c|Philosophy}} rather than {{cl|Philosophy}}, {{cls|Philosophy}}:
: {{tlf|c|Philosophy}} produces: {{c|Philosophy}}
: {{tlf|c|Category:philosophy}} produces: {{c|Category:philosophy}}
To specify the text used for the link – e.g. "Philosophy category" in place of "Philosophy" – add it as the next parameter:
: {{tlf|c|Philosophy|Philosophy category}} produces: {{c|Philosophy|Philosophy category}}
: {{tlf|c|Category:philosophy|Philosophy category}} produces: {{c|Category:philosophy|Philosophy category}}

== See also ==
* {{tl|cl}}, which produces the second type of link shown in the Usage section ({{cl|Philosophy}}, i.e. including the namespace prefix).
* {{tl|lcs}}, which produces output such as: {{lcs|Philosophy}}
* {{tl|icon}} for standard Wikipedia icons.
{{Internal category-link templates}}

== Template data ==
{{TemplateDataHeader}}
<templatedata>
{
	"description": "Creates links to categories without the namespace prefix.",
	"params": {
		"1": {
			"label": "Category name",
			"description": "The name of the category to link to, with or without the Category: prefix",
			"type": "string",
			"required": true
		},
		"2": {
			"label": "Link text",
			"description": "Text of the actual link, if you want to override it",
			"type": "string"
		}
	}
}
</templatedata>
<includeonly>{{basepage subpage
| <!----CATEGORIES BELOW THIS LINE, PLEASE:---->
}}</includeonly>

<noinclude>
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Internal category-link templates]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
